name: wagtail-modeladmin

metadata.name: wagtail-modeladmin
metadata.summary: Add any model in your project to the Wagtail admin. Formerly wagtail.contrib.modeladmin.

documentation:
# Wagtail ModelAdmin

[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-BSD_3--Clause-blue.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/BSD-3-Clause)
[![PyPI version](https://badge.fury.io/py/wagtail-modeladmin.svg)](https://badge.fury.io/py/wagtail-modeladmin)
[![ModelAdmin CI](https://github.com/wagtail-nest/wagtail-modeladmin/actions/workflows/test.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/wagtail-nest/wagtail-modeladmin/actions/workflows/test.yml)

Add any model in your project to the Wagtail admin. Formerly `wagtail.contrib.modeladmin`.

This package is in maintenance mode and will not receive new features. Consider [migrating to Snippets](https://docs.wagtail.org/en/v5.2.3/reference/contrib/modeladmin/migrating_to_snippets.html) and opening new feature requests in the [Wagtail issue tracker](https://github.com/wagtail/wagtail/issues).

## Links

- [Documentation](https://wagtail-modeladmin.readthedocs.io)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/wagtail-nest/wagtail-modeladmin/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Contributing](https://github.com/wagtail-nest/wagtail-modeladmin/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Discussions](https://github.com/wagtail-nest/wagtail-modeladmin/discussions)
- [Security](https://github.com/wagtail-nest/wagtail-modeladmin/security)

## Supported versions

- Python 3.8 (Wagtail 5.2 only), 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12, 3.13
- Django 4.2, 5.0, 5.1
- Wagtail 5.2, 6.1, 6.2, 6.3

## Installation

- `python -m pip install wagtail-modeladmin`
- Add `wagtail_modeladmin` to your `INSTALLED_APPS` setting.
  ```python
  INSTALLED_APPS = [
      # ...
      "wagtail_modeladmin",
      # ...
  ]
  ```

## Contributing

### Install

To make changes to this project, first clone this repository:

```sh
git clone https://github.com/wagtail-nest/wagtail-modeladmin.git
cd wagtail-modeladmin
```

With your preferred virtualenv activated, install testing dependencies:

#### Using pip

```sh
python -m pip install --upgrade pip>=21.3
python -m pip install -e .[testing] -U
```

#### Using flit

```sh
python -m pip install flit
flit install
```

### pre-commit

Note that this project uses [pre-commit](https://github.com/pre-commit/pre-commit).
It is included in the project testing requirements. To set up locally:

```shell
# go to the project directory
$ cd wagtail-modeladmin
# initialize pre-commit
$ pre-commit install

# Optional, run all checks once for this, then the checks will run only on the changed files
$ git ls-files --others --cached --exclude-standard | xargs pre-commit run --files
```

### How to run tests

Now you can run tests as shown below:

```sh
tox
```

or, you can run them for a specific environment `tox -e python3.10-django4.2-wagtail4.1` or specific test
`tox -e python3.10-django4.2-wagtail4.1-sqlite wagtail-modeladmin.tests.test_file.TestClass.test_method`

To run the test app interactively, use `tox -e interactive`, visit `http://127.0.0.1:8020/admin/` and log in with `admin`/`changeme`.

functions.name: wagtail_modeladmin.templatetags.modeladmin_tags.items_for_result
documentation: Generates the actual list of data.

functions.name: wagtail_modeladmin.templatetags.modeladmin_tags.result_list
documentation: Displays the headers and data list together

functions.name: wagtail_modeladmin.templatetags.modeladmin_tags.prepopulated_slugs
documentation:
Create a list of prepopulated_fields that should render Javascript for
the prepopulated fields for modeladmin forms.

classes.name: wagtail_modeladmin.templatetags.modeladmin_tags.RawFormattedFieldNode
documentation:
Duplicate of wagtailadmin_tags {% rawformattedfield %}...{% endrawformattedfield %} tag to allow
consistent use across Wagtail 5.x and 6.x; in 5.x this was {% field %}...{% endfield %}.

classes.name: wagtail_modeladmin.mixins.ThumbnailMixin
documentation:
Mixin class to help display thumbnail images in ModelAdmin listing results.
`thumb_image_field_name` must be overridden to name a ForeignKey field on
your model, linking to `wagtailimages.Image`.

classes.name: wagtail_modeladmin.menus.ModelAdminMenuItem
documentation:
A sub-class of wagtail's MenuItem, used by PageModelAdmin to add a link
to its listing page

classes.name: wagtail_modeladmin.menus.GroupMenuItem
documentation:
A sub-class of wagtail's SubmenuMenuItem, used by ModelAdminGroup to add a
link to the admin menu with its own submenu, linking to various listing
pages

classes.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.permission.PermissionHelper

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.permission.PermissionHelper.get_all_model_permissions
documentation:
Return a queryset of all Permission objects pertaining to the `model`
specified at initialisation.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.permission.PermissionHelper.user_has_specific_permission
documentation:
Combine `perm_codename` with `self.opts.app_label` to call the provided
Django user's built-in `has_perm` method.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.permission.PermissionHelper.user_has_any_permissions
documentation:
Return a boolean to indicate whether `user` has any model-wide
permissions

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.permission.PermissionHelper.user_can_list
documentation:
Return a boolean to indicate whether `user` is permitted to access the
list view for self.model

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.permission.PermissionHelper.user_can_create
documentation:
Return a boolean to indicate whether `user` is permitted to create new
instances of `self.model`

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.permission.PermissionHelper.user_can_inspect_obj
documentation:
Return a boolean to indicate whether `user` is permitted to 'inspect'
a specific `self.model` instance.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.permission.PermissionHelper.user_can_edit_obj
documentation:
Return a boolean to indicate whether `user` is permitted to 'change'
a specific `self.model` instance.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.permission.PermissionHelper.user_can_delete_obj
documentation:
Return a boolean to indicate whether `user` is permitted to 'delete'
a specific `self.model` instance.

Provides permission-related helper functions to help determine what a
user can do with a 'typical' model (where permissions are granted
model-wide), and to a specific instance of that model.

classes.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.permission.PagePermissionHelper

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.permission.PagePermissionHelper.get_valid_parent_pages
documentation:
Identifies possible parent pages for the current user by first looking
at allowed_parent_page_models() on self.model to limit options to the
correct type of page, then checking permissions on those individual
pages to make sure we have permission to add a subpage to it.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.permission.PagePermissionHelper.user_can_list
documentation:
For models extending Page, permitted actions are determined by
permissions on individual objects. Rather than check for change
permissions on every object individually (which would be quite
resource intensive), we simply always allow the list view to be
viewed, and limit further functionality when relevant.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.permission.PagePermissionHelper.user_can_create
documentation:
For models extending Page, whether or not a page of this type can be
added somewhere in the tree essentially determines the add permission,
rather than actual model-wide permissions

Provides permission-related helper functions to help determine what
a user can do with a model extending Wagtail's Page model. It differs
from `PermissionHelper`, because model-wide permissions aren't really
relevant. We generally need to determine permissions on an
object-specific basis.

classes.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.url.ModelAdminURLFinder
documentation: for registering with wagtail.admin.admin_url_finder.
Subclasses should define url_helper and permission_helper

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.search.BaseSearchHandler.search_queryset
documentation:
Returns an iterable of objects from `queryset` matching the
provided `search_term`.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.helpers.search.BaseSearchHandler.show_search_form
documentation:
Returns a boolean that determines whether a search form should be
displayed in the IndexView UI.

classes.name: wagtail_modeladmin.views.WMABaseView
documentation: Groups together common functionality for all app views.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.views.IndexView.get_filename
documentation: Get filename for exported spreadsheet, without extension

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.views.IndexView.get_heading
documentation: Get headings for exported spreadsheet column for the relevant field

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.views.IndexView.to_row_dict
documentation: Returns an OrderedDict (in the order given by list_export) of the exportable information for a model instance

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.views.IndexView.get_filters_params
documentation: Returns all params except IGNORED_PARAMS

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.views.IndexView.get_ordering_field
documentation:
Returns the proper model field name corresponding to the given
field_name to use for ordering. field_name may either be the name of a
proper model field or the name of a method (on the admin or model) or a
callable with the 'admin_order_field' attribute. Returns None if no
proper model field name can be matched.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.views.IndexView.get_ordering
documentation:
Returns the list of ordering fields for the change list.
First we check the get_ordering() method in model admin, then we check
the object's default ordering. Then, any manually-specified ordering
from the query string overrides anything. Finally, a deterministic
order is guaranteed by ensuring the primary key is used as the last
ordering field.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.views.IndexView.get_ordering_field_columns
documentation: Returns an OrderedDict of ordering field column numbers and asc/desc

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.views.InspectView.get_field_label
documentation: Return a label to display for a field

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.views.InspectView.get_field_display_value
documentation: Return a display value for a field/attribute

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.views.InspectView.get_image_field_display
documentation: Render an image

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.views.InspectView.get_document_field_display
documentation: Render a link to a document

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.views.InspectView.get_dict_for_field
documentation:
Return a dictionary containing `label` and `value` values to display
for a field.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.views.InspectView.get_fields_dict
documentation:
Return a list of `label`/`value` dictionaries to represent the
fields named by the model_admin class's `get_inspect_view_fields` method

functions.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.modeladmin_register
documentation: Method for registering ModelAdmin or ModelAdminGroup classes with Wagtail.

classes.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.WagtailRegisterable
documentation:
Base class, providing a more convenient way for ModelAdmin or
ModelAdminGroup instances to be registered with Wagtail's admin area.

classes.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.__init__
documentation: Don't allow initialisation unless self.model is set to a valid model

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_permission_helper_class
documentation:
Returns a permission_helper class to help with permission-based logic
for the given model.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_button_helper_class
documentation:
Returns a ButtonHelper class to help generate buttons for the given
model.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_menu_label
documentation: Returns the label text to be used for the menu item.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_menu_item_name
documentation: Returns the name to be used for the menu item.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_menu_icon
documentation:
Returns the icon to be used for the menu item. The value is prepended
with 'icon-' to create the full icon class name. For design
consistency, the same icon is also applied to the main heading for
views called by this class.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_menu_order
documentation:
Returns the 'order' to be applied to the menu item. 000 being first
place. Where ModelAdminGroup is used, the menu_order value should be
applied to that, and any ModelAdmin classes added to 'items'
attribute will be ordered automatically, based on their order in that
sequence.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_list_display
documentation:
Return a sequence containing the fields/method output to be displayed
in the list view.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_list_display_add_buttons
documentation:
Return the name of the field/method from list_display where action
buttons should be added. Defaults to the first item from
get_list_display()

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_list_export
documentation:
Return a sequence containing the fields/method output to be displayed
in spreadsheet exports.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_empty_value_display
documentation: Return the empty_value_display value defined on ModelAdmin

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_list_filter
documentation:
Returns a sequence containing the fields to be displayed as filters in
the right sidebar in the list view.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_ordering
documentation:
Returns a sequence defining the default ordering for results in the
list view.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_queryset
documentation:
Returns a QuerySet of all model instances that can be edited by the
admin site.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_search_fields
documentation:
Returns a sequence defining which fields on a model should be searched
when a search is initiated from the list view.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_search_handler
documentation:
Returns an instance of `self.search_handler_class` that can be used by
`IndexView`.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_extra_search_kwargs
documentation:
Returns a dictionary of additional kwargs to be sent to
`SearchHandler.search_queryset()`.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_extra_attrs_for_row
documentation:
Return a dictionary of HTML attributes to be added to the `<tr>`
element for the supplied `obj` when rendering the results table in
`index_view`. `data-object-pk` is already added by default.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_extra_class_names_for_field_col
documentation:
Return a list of additional CSS class names to be added to the table
cell's `class` attribute when rendering the output of `field_name` for
`obj` in `index_view`.

Must always return a list.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_extra_attrs_for_field_col
documentation:
Return a dictionary of additional HTML attributes to be added to a
table cell when rendering the output of `field_name` for `obj` in
`index_view`.

Must always return a dictionary.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_prepopulated_fields
documentation: Returns a sequence specifying custom prepopulated fields slugs on Create/Edit pages.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_form_fields_exclude
documentation: Returns a list or tuple of fields names to be excluded from Create/Edit pages.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_inspect_view_fields
documentation:
Return a list of field names, indicating the model fields that
should be displayed in the 'inspect' view. Returns the value of the
'inspect_view_fields' attribute if populated, otherwise a sensible
list of fields is generated automatically, with any field named in
'inspect_view_fields_exclude' not being included.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.index_view
documentation:
Instantiates a class-based view to provide listing functionality for
the assigned model. The view class used can be overridden by changing
the 'index_view_class' attribute.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.create_view
documentation:
Instantiates a class-based view to provide 'creation' functionality for
the assigned model, or redirect to Wagtail's create view if the
assigned model extends 'Page'. The view class used can be overridden by
changing the 'create_view_class' attribute.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.choose_parent_view
documentation:
Instantiates a class-based view to allows a parent page to be chosen
for a new object, where the assigned model extends Wagtail's Page
model, and there is more than one potential parent for new instances.
The view class used can be overridden by changing the
'choose_parent_view_class' attribute.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.inspect_view
documentation:
Instantiates a class-based view to provide 'inspect' functionality for
the assigned model. The view class used can be overridden by changing
the 'inspect_view_class' attribute.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.edit_view
documentation:
Instantiates a class-based view to provide 'edit' functionality for the
assigned model, or redirect to Wagtail's edit view if the assigned
model extends 'Page'. The view class used can be overridden by changing
the  'edit_view_class' attribute.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.delete_view
documentation:
Instantiates a class-based view to provide 'delete confirmation'
functionality for the assigned model, or redirect to Wagtail's delete
confirmation view if the assigned model extends 'Page'. The view class
used can be overridden by changing the 'delete_view_class'
attribute.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_edit_handler
documentation:
Returns the appropriate edit_handler for this modeladmin class.
edit_handlers can be defined either on the model itself or on the
modeladmin (as property edit_handler or panels). Falls back to
extracting panel / edit handler definitions from the model class.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_templates
documentation:
Utility function that provides a list of templates to try for a given
view, when the template isn't overridden by one of the template
attributes on the class.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_index_template
documentation:
Returns a template to be used when rendering 'index_view'. If a
template is specified by the 'index_template_name' attribute, that will
be used. Otherwise, a list of preferred template names are returned.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_choose_parent_template
documentation:
Returns a template to be used when rendering 'choose_parent_view'. If a
template is specified by the 'choose_parent_template_name' attribute,
that will be used. Otherwise, a list of preferred template names are
returned.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_inspect_template
documentation:
Returns a template to be used when rendering 'inspect_view'. If a
template is specified by the 'inspect_template_name' attribute, that
will be used. Otherwise, a list of preferred template names are
returned.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_history_template
documentation:
Returns a template to be used when rendering 'history_view'. If a
template is specified by the 'history_template_name' attribute, that
will be used. Otherwise, a list of preferred template names are
returned.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_create_template
documentation:
Returns a template to be used when rendering 'create_view'. If a
template is specified by the 'create_template_name' attribute,
that will be used. Otherwise, a list of preferred template names are
returned.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_edit_template
documentation:
Returns a template to be used when rendering 'edit_view'. If a template
is specified by the 'edit_template_name' attribute, that will be used.
Otherwise, a list of preferred template names are returned.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_delete_template
documentation:
Returns a template to be used when rendering 'delete_view'. If
a template is specified by the 'delete_template_name'
attribute, that will be used. Otherwise, a list of preferred template
names are returned.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_menu_item
documentation:
Utilised by Wagtail's 'register_menu_item' hook to create a menu item
to access the listing view, or can be called by ModelAdminGroup
to create a submenu

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_permissions_for_registration
documentation:
Utilised by Wagtail's 'register_permissions' hook to allow permissions
for a model to be assigned to groups in settings. This is only required
if the model isn't a Page model, and isn't registered as a Snippet

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdmin.get_admin_urls_for_registration
documentation:
Utilised by Wagtail's 'register_admin_urls' hook to register urls for
our the views that class offers.

The core modeladmin class. It provides an alternative means to
list and manage instances of a given 'model' within Wagtail's admin area.
It is essentially comprised of attributes and methods that allow a degree
of control over how the data is represented, and other methods to make the
additional functionality available via various Wagtail hooks.

classes.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdminGroup

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdminGroup.__init__
documentation:
When initialising, instantiate the classes within 'items', and assign
the instances to a 'modeladmin_instances' attribute for convenient
access later

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdminGroup.get_menu_item
documentation:
Utilised by Wagtail's 'register_menu_item' hook to create a menu
for this group with a submenu linking to listing pages for any
associated ModelAdmin instances

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdminGroup.get_permissions_for_registration
documentation:
Utilised by Wagtail's 'register_permissions' hook to allow permissions
for a all models grouped by this class to be assigned to Groups in
settings.

methods.name: wagtail_modeladmin.options.ModelAdminGroup.get_admin_urls_for_registration
documentation:
Utilised by Wagtail's 'register_admin_urls' hook to register urls for
used by any associated ModelAdmin instances

Acts as a container for grouping together mutltiple PageModelAdmin and
SnippetModelAdmin instances. Creates a menu item with a submenu for
accessing the listing pages of those instances
